title: Chore: Update project dependencies
original_text: Updated project dependencies to their latest stable versions. Upgraded pytest from 7.0.0 to 7.4.0, requests from 2.28.0 to 2.31.0, and numpy from 1.23.0 to 1.26.0. Also updated development dependencies including black, flake8, and mypy. Ran the full test suite to ensure compatibility. Updated requirements.txt and requirements-dev.txt. Result: 71 tests pass.
expected_subject: chore(deps): update dependencies to latest stable versions
expected_body_lines: - Upgrade pytest, requests, numpy to latest versions
- Update dev dependencies: black, flake8, mypy
- Verify compatibility with full test suite
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(deps): update dependencies to latest stable versions"
